heading: Vesting of title in the United States
label: 3807 Vesting of title in the United States
text: If a contract paid by a method authorized under provides for title to property to vest in the United States, the title to the property shall vest in accordance with the terms of the contract, regardless of any security interest in the property that is asserted before or after the contract is entered into.section 3801(a) of this title
